meaning: adj.保险精算师的,保险精算的
examples: The company's actuarial report is available on demand.
No previous course work in Actuarial Science is required.
Now I'm thinking of shifting to actuarial studies, as I don't find accounting very exciting.
A. from Wharton in 1963 and then worked for a Philadelphia actuarial consulting firm.
Actuarial firm Hewitt Associates has looked at the rules of 168 schemes which are its clients.
